What it does

Everything a Dublin driver actually needs.

No upsells. No subscriptions. No guessing. sloto. gives you real-time parking status computed from Dublin City Council's own operating hours — the moment you open the app.

🗺️

1,279 spots on one map

Every verified on-street bay in Dublin city centre, colour-coded by status right now. Green is free. Red is paid. Grey is no-parking. Simple as that.

  • Free vs paid computed from council operating hours
  • Filter by Free now, Paid now, or No parking
  • Rate labels on paid spots at zoom 14+
  • Satellite view toggle for street-level orientation
📍

One tap to park

Tap "Park Here" and sloto. saves your spot with a satisfying car-lock sound, heavy haptics, and a live timer — then takes you straight to My Car.

⏱️

Smart parking timer

Free parking? You'll get a notification 10 minutes before it ends. Paid? Set a meter reminder up to 8 hours. Never get caught out again.

🚶

Find your way back

Tap "Walk back to my car" and sloto. opens Apple Maps or Google Maps with walking directions straight to where you parked.

👥

Live crowd reports

Drivers report when a street is full or has spots available. Community-sourced and real-time — the more people use it, the smarter it gets.

🏅

Earn badges

Report new parking spots and climb from Spot Scout to Spot Legend. A small thing that makes the map better for every Dublin driver.

How it works

Three steps. Zero stress.

Built for the way Dublin drivers actually park — in a hurry, on the side of the road, hoping for the best.

01

Open the map

See every parking spot near you, colour-coded in real time. Green means free right now. No login needed to browse.

Covers all of Dublin city centre
02

Tap a spot

See the street name, operating hours, number of bays, and the latest crowd report from other drivers in real time.

Crowd reports update live
03

Hit "Park Here"

Your spot is saved. Timer starts. You'll get a reminder before your time is up and walking directions back whenever you need them.

Saved state persists offline
My Car

Never forget where you parked. Ever.

The moment you tap "Park Here", sloto. saves your exact location, starts your timer, and keeps walking directions one tap away. The screen you'll use every single time.

  • Street name and timestamp saved instantly
  • Countdown timer for both free and paid parking
  • Submit crowd reports to help other drivers nearby
  • One tap to walk back via Apple or Google Maps
Spot detail

Everything you need before you commit to a street.

Tap any spot to instantly see the street name, current status, operating hours, bay count, and the latest community crowd report. No surprises when you arrive.

  • Real operating hours from Dublin City Council data
  • Live crowd report — full or spots available
  • Navigate directly from the detail sheet
  • Report wrong info if something has changed
